title: A Perfect Evening
article_text: Nobody wanted to examine the old farm, so I went alone. I saw a collection of old tools hanging on the wall. The display was interesting, but I needed to transfer some items to a new place. I intend to lay them out carefully for a regular show. The speed of my work was slightly slow because I worked alone. My physical condition is perfect, so I can work for a long time. I must reply to my friend about dinner plans. We plan to eat dinner together, and I will wear a suit. My friend's politics are different from mine, but we do not argue. Overall, the evening was good, and I will respond to his invitation tomorrow.

sentences.en: Nobody wanted to examine the old farm, so I went alone.
sentences.zh: 没有人想检查那个旧农场，所以我独自去了。

words.eng_def: land for growing food or keeping animals

sentences.en: I saw a collection of old tools hanging on the wall.
sentences.zh: 我看到墙上挂着一堆旧工具。

words.eng_def: a group of things kept together
to put something so it is held from above

sentences.en: The display was interesting, but I needed to transfer some items to a new place.
sentences.zh: 这个展示很有趣，但我需要把一些物品转移到新地方。

words.eng_def: move from one place to another

sentences.en: I intend to lay them out carefully for a regular show.
sentences.zh: 我打算把它们小心地摆好，做一个定期展览。

words.eng_def: put something down in a flat position
happening often or at set times

sentences.en: The speed of my work was slightly slow because I worked alone.
sentences.zh: 我工作的速度稍微有点慢，因为我独自工作。

words.eng_def: how fast something moves or happens
not fast; taking a long time

sentences.en: My physical condition is perfect, so I can work for a long time.
sentences.zh: 我的身体状况很好，所以我可以长时间工作。

sentences.en: I must reply to my friend about dinner plans.
sentences.zh: 我必须回复朋友关于晚餐计划的事。

words.eng_def: the main meal of the day, usually eaten in the evening

sentences.en: We plan to eat dinner together, and I will wear a suit.
sentences.zh: 我们计划一起吃晚餐，我会穿西装。

words.eng_def: a set of clothes with a jacket and pants

sentences.en: My friend's politics are different from mine, but we do not argue.
sentences.zh: 我朋友的政治观点和我的不同，但我们不争吵。

words.eng_def: activities related to government and power

sentences.en: Overall, the evening was good, and I will respond to his invitation tomorrow.
sentences.zh: 总的来说，这个晚上很好，我明天会回复他的邀请。

vocabulary.eng_def: how fast something moves or happens
vocabulary.example: The car's speed was very high.

vocabulary.eng_def: activities related to government and power

vocabulary.eng_def: move from one place to another

The weather is perfect today.

Overall, the trip was good.

The user can change the settings.

vocabulary.eng_def: the main meal of the day, usually eaten in the evening
vocabulary.example: We eat dinner at 7 o'clock.

vocabulary.eng_def: not fast; taking a long time
vocabulary.example: The turtle is very slow.

vocabulary.eng_def: happening often or at set times

vocabulary.eng_def: a set of clothes with a jacket and pants

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词的意思是“没有人”？

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'how fast something moves'?

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词的意思是“完美的”？

image_prompts: An old farm with nobody around, a person walking alone towards it.
A wall with old tools hanging on it, a collection of metal and wooden items.
A museum display with interesting objects, a person moving items to a new place.
A person carefully laying out tools on a table for a regular show.
A person working slowly alone, a clock showing the speed of time.
A fit person exercising, showing perfect physical condition.
A person looking at a phone, thinking about dinner plans with a friend.
Two people having dinner at a nice restaurant, one wearing a suit.
Two friends talking, one with a book about politics, the other with a different book.
A person smiling and writing a reply to an invitation, the evening scene outside.
